title: PangTeen's Plants vs Zombies
description: Bring Plants vs Zombies into Minecraft
body:
# Introduction:
Welcome to Plants vs Zombies mod made by PangTeen. Plants vs. Zombies mod aims to integrate the gameplay of Plants vs. Zombies with Minecraft, and bring players an unique survival adventure.
# How to play:
This mod adds a large number of plants and zombies from the original Plants vs. Zombies, as well as some original or funny plants and zombies. Players need to collect essence, plant seeds, and ore to craft plant cards. Plants can be summoned through plant cards. With the help of plants, players can better resist the invasion of zombies.
# Features:
Plant Level System: Most plants have levels, increasing plant level can make plants stronger. 

Energy Bean: can make plants be super mode. 

Currency: This mod has two currencies, money and gems, and there is currently Crazy Dave’s shop.

Zombie House: A unique structure generated in the world, usually with a treasure chest and a monster.

spawning cage with plant enjoy cards.

Enchantment: with some special enchantments, such as charm and explosion.
# Schedule:
At present, the latest version of 1.12.2 and 0.7.9 has 32 plants and 32 zombies, and the latest version of 1.15.2 and 0.3.3 has 55+ plants and 40+ zombies.
# Community:
Discord Server: https://discord.gg/CfHFqB34Ye
# Note:
The 1.12.2 , 1.15.2 version no longer update.

It's recommend to add a Patchouli mod 1.15.2-1.2-35 if you are playing this mod in 1.15.2-0.2.1+.

1.12.2 use Diamond Sword right click plant to use Plant Food.

# Thanks:

Model helper: GrassCarp, Wolf__Craystal, InkyTheSheep, Chompy, XXTT.
